description: §38.12 clean neg — an `export <channel name="feed">` with a static string-literal `name=` is the well-formed cross-file export form; E-CHANNEL-EXPORT-001 (and the E-CHANNEL-* family) stays silent. The delta from `channel/export-reactive-ref-name` is reactive-ref vs string-literal name.
rationale: §38.12: a string-literal `name=` gives the export a compile-time-stable wire identity, so the export is valid — E-CHANNEL-EXPORT-001 does not fire.
